description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a distressed, weathered white paint finish, giving it a rustic and vintage appearance. The tabletop consists of several parallel planks, some of which show visible wear, scratches, and chipped paint, revealing darker wood beneath. The table features four straight legs and a shallow apron, with two small round drawer knobs on the front, indicating the presence of a single shallow drawer. The drawer front and apron also display areas of chipped paint and exposed wood, adding to the aged look. The overall construction appears sturdy, with simple joinery and no ornate details. This table would be well-suited for use in urban outdoor settings such as parks, patios, or sidewalk cafes, as well as in garages or workshops.
description: A weathered, white-painted wooden table with a rustic finish, featuring a plank-style top and a single shallow drawer with two knobs. The table shows visible wear and chipped paint, giving it a vintage, utilitarian look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the plank tabletop, apron, and two round drawer knobs indicating a shallow drawer.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the tabletop planks and the simple, straight leg design.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back apron and more extensive areas of chipped paint and exposed wood.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible plank lines and a relatively clean apron, minimal decorative features.
